title: Field Applications Engineer
description:
If you are highly motivated, enthusiastic and have excellent technical skills, we offer a challenging career in an innovative technology company.

We are looking for a Field Applications Engineer at our office in Singapore and welcome your application.

Job Scopes

  • Pre-sales technical support

  • Assist sales team in technical proposal and tender submission

  • Review tender drawing / tender specification / requirement

  • Prepare system architecture drawing / technical design proposal

  • Coordinate with supplier and principal

  • Post-sales technical support

  • Provide after sales technical service

  • Troubleshoot technical enquiry

  • Conduct technical training

  • Coordinate with customer and end user

Requirements

  • Good knowledge in Electrical Safety / Power Quality / Energy and Building Management

  • Proactive, able to work independently

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving mind

  • Positive attitude, self-motivated, team player

  • Ability to work well under pressure, multitask and meet deadlines

  • Supplier and customer relationship management

  • Possess good inter-personal, communication & coordination skills

  • Exposure to regional APAC stakeholders, multilingual is a plus

  • Preferable specializing in Entry Level programming and electrical engineering

  • Preferable with SCADA / BMS / PMS / EMS related experience

  • At least 1-2 Year(s) of working experience in the related field are welcome

  • Successful Candidates will be posted for on-job training for 6 months.

postedCompany.description: Eetarp, an internationally active pioneer in electrical safety, power quality, and energy management, serves as the APAC headquarters for Bender GmbH & Co.KG (Germany). With extensive research, product development, and manufacturing capabilities, Eetarp has introduced innovations such as software solutions, energy management systems, analytic software, and components for safe e-Mobility charging. We provide critical industries worldwide with market-leading systems that monitor and analyze electrical systems, enhancing efficiency and preventing failures. With 20 years of experience, Eetarp is a top-tier partner for our customers. Join our team of more than 60 experts at Eetarp and more than 1400 employees at Bender.
postedCompany.name: EETARP ENGINEERING PTE LTD
